descriptionZh: 了解鸟类为什么迁徙以及它们如何找到路
descriptionEn: Learn why birds migrate and how they find their way

steps.narrationZh: 每年，数十亿只鸟类会进行长途旅行，这就是迁徙。让我们来看看一些最令人惊叹的迁徙路线。
steps.narrationEn: Every year, billions of birds make long journeys called migration. Let's look at some of the most amazing migration routes.

steps.narrationZh: 北极燕鸥是迁徙冠军！它每年从北极飞到南极，往返距离超过7万公里。
steps.narrationEn: The Arctic Tern is the migration champion! It flies from the Arctic to the Antarctic every year, a round trip of over 70,000 km.

steps.narrationZh: 斑尾塍鹬可以不停歇地飞行11000公里，从阿拉斯加到新西兰！
steps.narrationEn: The Bar-tailed Godwit can fly 11,000 km non-stop from Alaska to New Zealand!

steps.narrationZh: 现在让我们测试一下你学到了什么！
steps.narrationEn: Now let's test what you've learned!

descriptionZh: 探索生活在热带雨林中的色彩斑斓的鸟类
descriptionEn: Explore the colorful birds that live in tropical rainforests

steps.narrationZh: 热带雨林是地球上鸟类种类最多的地方。让我们去南美洲看看！
steps.narrationEn: Tropical rainforests have the most bird species on Earth. Let's visit South America!

steps.narrationZh: 金刚鹦鹉是热带雨林中最美丽的鸟类之一。它们鲜艳的羽毛帮助它们在茂密的森林中互相识别。
steps.narrationEn: Macaws are among the most beautiful birds in the rainforest. Their bright feathers help them recognize each other in the dense forest.

steps.narrationZh: 巨嘴鸟有一个巨大的喙，但它其实很轻！这个喙帮助它们够到远处的水果。
steps.narrationEn: Toucans have a huge beak, but it's actually very light! This beak helps them reach fruit that's far away.

descriptionZh: 了解鸟类如何在极端寒冷中生存
descriptionEn: Learn how birds survive in extreme cold

steps.narrationZh: 北极是地球上最寒冷的地方之一，但许多鸟类在这里生活得很好。让我们去看看！
steps.narrationEn: The Arctic is one of the coldest places on Earth, but many birds thrive here. Let's take a look!

steps.narrationZh: 帝企鹅可以在零下60度的严寒中生存。它们挤在一起取暖，轮流站在外面挡风。
steps.narrationEn: Emperor Penguins can survive temperatures of -60°C. They huddle together for warmth, taking turns standing on the outside.

steps.narrationZh: 雪鸮有厚厚的羽毛，甚至脚趾上都有羽毛来保暖！
steps.narrationEn: Snowy Owls have thick feathers, even on their toes, to stay warm!

descriptionZh: 了解鸟类身体的神奇之处
descriptionEn: Learn about the amazing features of bird bodies

steps.narrationZh: 鸟类的身体有许多特殊的设计，让它们能够飞翔、游泳或奔跑。
steps.narrationEn: Birds have many special body features that let them fly, swim, or run.

steps.narrationZh: 白头鹰的翼展可以超过2米！它们强壮的翅膀让它们能在高空翱翔数小时。
steps.narrationEn: A Bald Eagle's wingspan can be over 2 meters! Their strong wings let them soar for hours.

steps.narrationZh: 蜂鸟是唯一能向后飞的鸟！它们的翅膀每秒可以拍打80次。
steps.narrationEn: Hummingbirds are the only birds that can fly backwards! Their wings can beat 80 times per second.
